name: ai-context-optimizer
install_doc: Download .vsix from releases/beta/, open VS Code → Ctrl+Shift+P → 'Extensions: Install from VSIX'
notes: VS Code extension (VSIX) targeting Cline users. Claims 76% token reduction via smart file selection (TF-IDF relevance scoring), cache-explosion prevention (50k hard limit with smart trimming), context compression per file type (TS 85%, Python 82%, JSON 71%, Markdown 65%), and a Python/ML gateway (LLM-style). Also includes a 'Auto-Fix Token Limits' feature that patches Cline's hardcoded 8192 output token cap to match actual model limits (Claude 4 Sonnet → 64k). Has Pro license tier via Freemius. Implementation ships in two compiled .vsix blobs (~11.7 MB each) — source TypeScript not present in repo, only package.json and compiled artifacts. Cache-breaking: operates client-side on file selection/context before sending; does NOT intercept or rewrite conversation history. Target agent: Cline (VS Code extension).
